title: bridge fallback hardening — Phase-C plan (audit + top-3 + 4-stage rollout)
scope: design-only audit + plan; no bridge .hexa modification in this cycle

trigger.source: scout v2 finding: 9 of 11 sim_bridge dirs lack explicit OFFLINE-FALLBACK marker
trigger.parallel_track: PAPER_S9 caveat being added by sibling agent; this cycle = upstream fix design

audit.method: grep -c OFFLINE-FALLBACK across tool/*_bridge.hexa AND sim_bridge/*/

list_of_3_partial_gap: pubchem (has --no-fetch but emits 'fallback:hardcoded-...' not literal OFFLINE-FALLBACK)

result_sim_bridge_dirs.interpretation: scout v2 'OFFLINE-FALLBACK marker' = literal sentinel string; ZERO bridges across the entire surface emit canonical literal — only loose 'fallback'/'source=fallback' substrings. Gap is ecosystem-wide, not 9-vs-11.

post_oom_resolution_state.note: oeis/gw OPT-A shell-trim landed (1.2MB→2KB / 2.7MB→60KB) — live path now fits 4GB cgroup. OPT-C (hardcoded fallback) was REJECTED in that cycle ('would lose live-fetch semantics; bridges would silently degrade to static data when upstream changes'). Phase-C MUST respect this constraint: fallback path = additive escape hatch ONLY when live-empty, NEVER replaces live on success.

ranking.rationale: highest F# anchor count (F4, F12, F101 + others); n=6 perfect-number triple-source corroboration depends on it; A000396/A000203/A000005/A000010 selftest fixtures already enumerated; ~301 LOC (smallest of the 6); shell-trim already landed → fallback can plug straight in
ranking.fix_LOC_estimate: +45 lines (5-anchor hardcoded table + --no-fetch branch + sentinel emit)

ranking.rationale: F12 triple-source corroboration anchor; perfect_number_n6_anchor sentinel directly cited by F12 cmd; only 4 selftest refs (Pulsar/Perfect_number/Quantum_mechanics/Pi); ~338 LOC; n=6 anchor is single article — fallback table is one struct entry

GW150914/GW170817/GW190521 are landmark anchors; gw events used by sr_harness + bostrom_test simulators; baseline of 3 hardcoded events ≈ 30 lines; selftest gates events_total>=90 → fallback would set events_total to N_baseline_landmark with sentinel mode=fallback so health check classifies OFFLINE-FALLBACK not FAIL
ranking.fix_LOC_estimate: +40 lines (3-event hardcoded baseline + --no-fetch + sentinel + relax events_total threshold under no-fetch)

deferred_to_stage_2: arxiv_realtime_bridge — 'freshness is the point' (per health doc); fallback weakens semantic; lowest-priority offline path
simbad_bridge — 4 reference stars; fix straightforward but no F# anchor yet
openalex_bridge — 1 query; no F# anchor yet
uniprot_bridge — 1-line ok-decision fix (raw 73 surgical); already has fallback data
pubchem_bridge — already has fallback, just needs canonical sentinel rename
roadmap_dod_bridge — local SSOT, sentinel only (no live API to fall back from)

per_bridge_fix.common_pattern_gold_standard: gaia_bridge.hexa (lines 76-90 fallback table, line 418 'let mut source = "fallback:hardcoded_DR3"', line 450 'source = "live:gea.esac.esa.int/..."' — explicit mode disambiguation)
per_bridge_fix.icecube_pattern_alt: icecube_neutrino_bridge.hexa (line 21 'Hardcoded fallback (5 landmark events, used when --no-fetch or curl fails)', line 418 'source = "fallback:fetch-failed (IceCube-landmarks-hardcoded)"' — fail-AND-flag pattern)

additions: // ─── Hardcoded fallback table (4 anchor sequences, used when --no-fetch or fetch_empty) ───
// in run_single: if terms.len() == 0 { let fb = _fallback_lookup(seq_id); if fb.len() > 0 { terms = fb; source = "fallback:hardcoded_n6_anchor"; emit_sentinel("OFFLINE-FALLBACK") } }
bridge_1_oeis_diff_sketch.raw_73_admissibility: PASS — additive only; live path unchanged on success
bridge_1_oeis_diff_sketch.backward_compat: PRESERVED — fallback only triggers on empty live (already current FAIL state)
bridge_1_oeis_diff_sketch.cmd_sha256_impact: WILL CHANGE for tool/oeis_live_bridge.hexa; R5 chain entries citing this file need rotate (audit via grep tool/oeis_live_bridge.hexa state/ design/ → estimate ~6 R5 anchors per atlas_R5_tracking)

additions: // ─── Hardcoded fallback extracts (4 articles, used when --no-fetch or REST 0-byte) ───

fn _fallback_extract(article: string) -> string { match article { "Perfect_number" => "In number theory, a perfect number is a positive integer that is equal to the sum of its proper divisors. The smallest perfect number is 6, which is the sum of 1, 2, and 3. So 6 is a perfect number.", "Pulsar" => "...", "Quantum_mechanics" => "...", "Pi" => "...", _ => "" } }
// in fetch_summary: if extract.len() == 0 { let fb = _fallback_extract(article); if fb.len() > 0 { extract = fb; source = "fallback:hardcoded_n6_corpus"; emit OFFLINE-FALLBACK } }
bridge_2_wikipedia_diff_sketch.cmd_sha256_impact: WILL CHANGE; F12 cmd_sha256=259091967ba8667b will need re-anchor IF cmd grep target changes (it does NOT — keeps grepping perfect_number_n6_anchor=true sentinel which we preserve)

additions: // when fetched events==0 AND --no-fetch OR live-empty: events = _fallback_events(); source="fallback:landmarks-hardcoded"; emit OFFLINE-FALLBACK; relax selftest events_total>=90 → events_total>=3 under fallback mode

bridge_3_gw_diff_sketch.backward_compat: PRESERVED — live success path identical; fallback only activates when live=empty (current FAIL state)
bridge_3_gw_diff_sketch.cmd_sha256_impact: WILL CHANGE for tool/gw_observatory_bridge.hexa; no F# currently anchored to gw — minimal R5 churn

stage_1_top_3_immediate.scope: oeis + wikipedia + gw fallback paths landed; canonical sentinel literal OFFLINE-FALLBACK adopted
stage_1_top_3_immediate.verify_gate: bridge_health.sh shows offline_fallback>=3 (vs 0 today) AND all 3 bridges PASS under HEXA_NO_NETWORK=1 simulation

stage_2_remaining_6_medium.scope: arxiv + simbad + openalex new fallback (mirror gaia pattern); uniprot ok-decision 1-line fix; pubchem rename source string to canonical OFFLINE-FALLBACK literal; roadmap_dod skip (no live API)
stage_2_remaining_6_medium.verify_gate: bridge_health.sh offline_fallback >= 8; FAIL count = 0 under simulated network outage

stage_3_health_checker_standardize.scope: tool/bridge_health.sh detection regex tightened from loose 'fallback|offline|no.?fetch' (line 181/184) to canonical 'OFFLINE-FALLBACK' literal; loose match retained as legacy fallback for transition window
stage_3_health_checker_standardize.verify_gate: bridge_health.sh JSONL emits offline_fallback count matching stage-1+2 fix count exactly

stage_4_paper_S9_caveat_update.scope: after stages 1-3 complete: PAPER_S9 caveat 'fallback markers absent' → 'fallback markers present in 15/16 bridges (roadmap_dod is local SSOT, no API)'
stage_4_paper_S9_caveat_update.verify_gate: paper section S9 cross-references current bridge_health.sh JSONL run, audit checksum matches

F4_oeis_drift.post_fallback_behavior: still PASS via live path; under network outage emits OEIS PASS with mode=fallback annotation; no cmd change needed (sentinel grep token preserved)
F4_oeis_drift.rotate_required: NO if OEIS PASS literal preserved; cmd_sha256 unchanged

F12_triple_source_n6_corroboration.post_fallback_behavior: PASS preserved as long as oeis A000396_first=6 AND wikipedia perfect_number_n6_anchor=true AND codata OK — fallback path emits same anchor sentinels (n=6 perfect-number content is hardcoded in fallback table)

F101_sigma_a000203_n6.post_fallback_behavior: atlas grep is on n6/atlas.append.hexa-sim-bridges.n6 (file content), not bridge runtime — fallback irrelevant

new_falsifier_F186_proposed.claim: every bridge in tool/*_bridge.hexa registry (excluding roadmap_dod local-SSOT) emits the canonical literal 'OFFLINE-FALLBACK' under --no-fetch mode; ecosystem-wide canonical sentinel guard
new_falsifier_F186_proposed.cmd_sketch: BR=$(ls /Users/ghost/core/nexus/tool/*_bridge.hexa | grep -v roadmap_dod); MISS=0; for f in $BR; do HEXA_RESOLVER_NO_REROUTE=1 /Users/ghost/core/hexa-lang/hexa run "$f" --selftest --no-fetch 2>&1 | grep -q OFFLINE-FALLBACK || MISS=$((MISS+1)); done; [ $MISS -eq 0 ] && echo ALL_BRIDGES_OFFLINE_FALLBACK_MARKER_PRESENT
new_falsifier_F186_proposed.reason: one or more bridges silently dropped the canonical OFFLINE-FALLBACK sentinel — ecosystem regression in the offline-mode honesty contract; PAPER_S9 caveat would silently re-open
new_falsifier_F186_proposed.fix: identify failing bridge by re-running per-bridge --no-fetch + grep; ensure fallback path emits 'OFFLINE-FALLBACK mode=fallback source=<bridge>:<anchor>' literal; verify against gaia_bridge gold-standard pattern (line 418/450)
new_falsifier_F186_proposed.origin: raw 71 bridge fallback hardening Phase-C ω-cycle 2026-04-26 — meta sentinel guard preventing silent regression of stage-1+2 fix
new_falsifier_F186_proposed.tier: tier_2 — meta-falsifier (does NOT belong in core science F# but in registry-integrity tier)

cross_engine_fallback_pattern.precedent: HEXA_TOOLS_README hardcoded reference table inside bridge .hexa (gaia + icecube + nist patterns)

canonical_sentinel_spec.rationale: two-way disambiguation; allows F# cmds to grep one or both

f_anchor_strategy.option_B_dual: two F# entries: F-x-live and F-x-offline; live PASSes when ONLINE-LIVE, offline PASSes when OFFLINE-FALLBACK
f_anchor_strategy.recommended: option_A for existing F4/F12 (preserves cmd_sha256); option_B for new F186 meta-guard

cross_engine_fallback_pattern.alignment_with_raw_66: OFFLINE-FALLBACK sentinel includes reason+fix trailer per ai-native error contract (e.g. 'reason: live fetch returned 0 bytes; fix: drop --no-fetch flag and verify network when upstream restored')

tier_1_recommendations.action: add 4-anchor hardcoded fallback table + --no-fetch flag + emit canonical OFFLINE-FALLBACK sentinel
tier_1_recommendations.rationale: highest F# coverage (F4 F12 F101); n=6 triple-source corroboration backbone

tier_1_recommendations.action: add 4-article hardcoded extract table + --no-fetch + canonical sentinel
tier_1_recommendations.rationale: F12 triple-source corroboration anchor; perfect_number_n6 article load-bearing

tier_1_recommendations.action: add 3-event landmark baseline (GW150914/GW170817/GW190521) + --no-fetch + canonical sentinel + relax events_total threshold under fallback mode
tier_1_recommendations.rationale: GW landmark events anchor sr_harness + bostrom_test simulators

tier_2_recommendations.note: freshness-by-design; fallback weakens semantic — lowest priority
4 reference stars hardcoded — mirror gaia pattern
1-line ok-decision fix; sentinel emits FAIL even when fallback complete (gaia pattern correction)
rename existing 'fallback:hardcoded-...' source string to include canonical 'OFFLINE-FALLBACK' literal
tighten line 181/184 regex from loose 'fallback|offline|no.?fetch' to canonical literal 'OFFLINE-FALLBACK' (legacy substring retained for transition window)
register F186 'all-bridges-offline-fallback-marker-present' (meta sentinel guard preventing silent regression)
